body:
## Summary
- load `shouldSuppressLaunchPopupAdForPath` from the shared ad policy in the visual-smoke report verifier
- remove the local suppressed-route list from the visual-smoke manifest assertion
- add focused `validate-content` launch-ad deferral/timeout cleanup mirrors expected by the existing parity tests

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test scripts/visual-smoke-report.test.js tests/content-launch-ad-route-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "visual smoke|launch overlay|suppressed route|shouldSuppressLaunchPopupAdForPath|route suppression"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-launch-ad-deferral`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/visual-smoke.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: Share launch suppression policy in visual smoke report
